G=G+L*(626422-626358)^((34326+-34323)-y)y=y+(672844+-672843)if y==44638+-44634 then y=176684+-176684 local x=B(G/(63351-(-2185)))local T=B((G%(-568569+634105))/(-646627-(-646883)))local a(b,N(B((G%(314609+-249073))/(-191992+192248))))end break end Q=Q+(-377404-(-377405))end i[x]=A(b)end end end return(function(x,L,N,c,a,A,i,S,P,r,q,h,J,Z,y,b,Y,F,o,G,Q,l,B)h,o,q,Y,S,P,y,Q,b,l,G,B,r,F,Z,J={},function(x,T)local L=G(T)local N=function(N,c,a,A)return Y(x,{N;c,a,A},T,L)end return N end,function(x,T)local L=G(T)local N=function(...)return Y(x,{...},T,L)end return N end,function(Y,N,c,a)local p,U,I,k,V,j,h,W,M,O,w,e,t,C,X,G,xy,g,Q,u,i,v,H,E,z,K,R,y,Ty,s,Yy,D,f,m,q,d,n while Y do
